top_signals.title: Most Stocks Rise as Oil Sinks; Micron Rallies Late: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Most US stocks rose after a rout driven by worries over whether the unprecedented spending on artificial-intelligence will be justified, with a drop in oil also helping sentiment.

top_signals.title: Micron stock jumps 9% as soaring prices from memory crunch lead to quadrupling of revenue
top_signals.summary: Micron's quarterly earnings report follows a 700% surge in the memory maker's stock price over the past year.

top_signals.title: Backup capital progress shows Takaichi is listening to JIP despite LDP concerns
top_signals.summary: A deal on the matter gave Takaichi the needed votes to become prime minister and form a ruling coalition.
